case_title: DAVID JAMES BOWDEN VS. MATEO ADVISORS, LLC.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOWDEN, DAVID JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT MATEO ADVISORS, LLC., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
